title: Clip webpage to  Dynamically Selected Monday.com Board/Group

posts.author: rkaplan (Richard Kaplan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to clip the contents of a web page to a specific Board/Group chosen at the time of web clipping?

I could use Zapier or Make or other solutions if I wanted to clip a web page to a fixed incoming board. Is there some way I can instead be presented with a list of my Boards/Groups to choose which one to use each time?
